hooks.command: bash -lc 'payload=$(cat); printf "%s" "$payload" | jq -r ".. | objects | .file_path? // .path? // .filename? // empty" | sort -u | while IFS= read -r file_path; do [ -n "$file_path" ] || continue; case "$file_path" in /*) scripts/post-edit-hook.sh "$file_path" ;; *) scripts/post-edit-hook.sh "$PWD/$file_path" ;; esac; done || true'
